seo.defaultDescription: Lexcase is the professional legal case management platform for attorneys. Cases, calendar, contacts and finances — all stored locally on your Mac.

footer.availability: Lexcase is available for macOS 11 Big Sur or later. A Windows 11 version is coming soon.

home.heroSubtitle: Cases, contacts, deadlines and finances in one native Mac app. For attorneys, real estate offices, immigration consultants and any professional handling case records. All local, no external cloud.
home.audienceEyebrow: Made for the work you do
home.audienceTitle: If case records are your day, this is for you.
home.audienceBody: Lexcase was built for professionals who live between documents, deadlines and clients. The same app fits a law firm, a real estate office or an immigration consultancy — each case type with the right fields.
home.audience1Body: Judicial and administrative cases with court, opposing party, hearings and next required actions.
home.audience2Body: Rental contracts under DR Law 85-25 and full real estate sales through the Title Registry.
home.audience3Body: DS-160, DS-260, A-Number, NVC Case, VAC and consular appointments — all in one case.
home.audience4Body: SRL, SA, EIRL, SAS in DR and LLC, C-Corp, S-Corp in USA with their corresponding filings.
home.audAbogadosSub: Judicial and administrative cases with deadlines, hearings and opposing party always in sight.
home.audInmobiliariasSub: Owner portfolio, rentals under DR Law 85-25 and full real estate sales through the Title Registry.
home.audMigracionSub: DS-160, DS-260, NVC, A-Number, VAC and consular appointments — the full immigration case.
home.audEmpresasSub: Company formation and corporate filings in DR (SRL, SA, EIRL, SAS) and USA (LLC, C-Corp, S-Corp).
home.platformsLine: Built for macOS 11 or later. Windows coming soon.
home.section1Body: Judicial, administrative, immigration, business, rental and real estate — every type with the legal fields you actually need.
home.section2Body: Every contact with ID number, phone, email, address and notes. Automatic 90% duplicate detection and quick filters by client status.
home.section3Body: DOP, USD and EUR coexist in the same view with the official Central Bank of the Dominican Republic rate updated live.
home.section4Title: Your cases never leave your Mac.
home.section4Body: Everything lives inside the macOS sandbox container. No servers of ours. No Google Analytics, Mixpanel, Sentry or Firebase. The only external request, optional, is to the public BCRD rate.
home.section4Point2: Automatic backups to the folder you choose
home.section4Point3: JSON export and import any time
home.ctaSectionBody: Available for Mac. Windows coming soon.

features.title: Every feature built for busy attorneys.
features.subtitle: A detailed look at the product, from case management to native OS integration.
features.cases1: Case types: Judicial, Administrative, Immigration, Business, Rental and Real Estate, each with specialized fields.
features.cases2: Legal-specific fields: court of jurisdiction, opposing party, opposing counsel, hearings, next actions, DS-160 / DS-260 / A-Number / NVC Case.
features.cases3: Company formation in the Dominican Republic (SRL, SA, EIRL, SAS) and the United States (LLC, C-Corp, S-Corp).
features.cases4: Rental contracts under DR Law 85-25 with automatic deposit cap and annual raise alerts.
features.calendar1: Month, week and day views with hearings, deadlines and meetings.
features.calendar2: Optional sync with native macOS Calendar — receive alerts like any other event.
features.calendar3: Persistent chip showing the next official Dominican Republic holiday.
features.clients1: Directory with ID number, phone, email, address and notes.
features.clients2: Automatic 90% duplicate detection by name, email or phone.
features.clients3: Quick filters by client status, with or without cases, no phone, archived.
features.finances1: Total fees, advances and expenses tracked per case.
features.finances2: Live exchange rate from the Central Bank of the Dominican Republic for DOP, USD and EUR.
features.finances3: KPIs for earned, lost, receivable and balance per case. Filters by financial status.
features.notes1: Rich-text editor inspired by Apple Notes for every case.
features.notes2: Link local folders or Google Drive folders to access physical files from the case view.
features.search1: Global search via ⌘E shortcut from anywhere in the app.
features.search2: Fuzzy search that tolerates typos, with recent history and keyboard navigation.
features.search3: Full keyboard shortcuts: ⌘N new, ⌘U contact, ⌘T task, ⌘H hearing.
features.backup1: Automatic daily, weekly or monthly backups to the folder you choose.
features.backup2: JSON export and import any time.
features.backup3: macOS sandbox, FileVault recommended, no telemetry services.
features.design1: Native macOS look with windows, traffic lights and system materials.
features.design2: Automatic light and dark mode based on system preference.
features.sp1Body: Every case carries the right fields for its nature. No generic forms, no time wasted deciding what to fill.
features.sp2Body: Built-in calendar with optional sync to macOS Calendar. Persistent chip showing the next Dominican Republic holiday. Alerts like any other system event.
features.sp3Title: Fees in DOP, USD or EUR.
features.sp3Body: Lexcase queries the official Central Bank of the Dominican Republic rate and converts automatically. KPIs for earned, lost, receivable and balance — per case and aggregated.
features.sp4Title: Your data lives on your Mac. Period.
features.sp4Body: No servers of ours. No Google Analytics, Mixpanel, Sentry or Firebase. The only external connection is to the public BCRD rate — and it's optional.
features.moreTitle: Small things that change your flow.
features.tile1Body: Cases, contacts and notes via one shortcut (⌘E). Fuzzy search that tolerates typos.
features.tile2Body: ⌘N new · ⌘U contact · ⌘T task · ⌘H hearing · Esc close. Run it all without touching the mouse.
features.tile3Body: Same phone or ID number, even if the name or email differs. 90% similarity match by phone or ID.
features.tile4Body: Export your whole database to JSON in the folder you choose — daily, weekly or monthly. Import anytime.
features.tile5Body: Rich-text editor inspired by Apple Notes on every case. Link local folders or Google Drive folders.
features.tile6Body: Windows, traffic lights and system materials. Automatic light and dark mode. Full Spanish and English.

support.title: We're here to help.
support.subtitle: Before reaching out, check the quick options. If you can't find your answer there, write to us directly — we read every message.
support.selfBody: Review our FAQ and Privacy Policy. Most common questions are answered there.
support.emailBody: To report an issue, suggest an improvement or request personalized help. We reply during Dominican Republic business hours.
support.compatItem4: Optional internet connection (only for BCRD rate)
support.winBody: We're working on the Windows 11 version. If you'd like to be notified when it's ready, drop us a line at our support email.

contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.subtitle: For anything about Lexcase, technical support, partnerships or data privacy, write to us directly. We don't use forms — we prefer a human channel.
contact.responseBody: We reply during Dominican Republic business hours (UTC-4), Monday to Friday. Most emails are answered in less than 24 hours.
contact.developerBody: ICLVS Legal Intelligence LLC. Application designed and maintained by Eduardo Espinal, attorney and developer, for modern legal practice in the Dominican Republic and the United States.

faq.title: What we get asked the most.
faq.subtitle: Common questions about Lexcase, its privacy model and how it compares to other legal case managers.
faq.q1: Are my cases uploaded to any cloud?
faq.a1: No. All your information lives inside the app's sandbox container on your own Mac (~/Library/Containers/com.lexcaserd.app/). Lexcase has no servers of ours. The only internet request it ever makes is optional: fetching the public exchange rate from the Central Bank of the Dominican Republic.
faq.a2: Yes. Lexcase works fully offline. The only feature requiring internet is updating the BCRD exchange rate for the Finances section, and the last cached rate can be used when there's no connection.
faq.q3: Which versions of macOS are supported?
faq.a3: Lexcase requires macOS 11 Big Sur or later. It runs natively on Apple Silicon Macs (M1, M2, M3, M4) and on Intel Macs.
faq.q4: Will there be a Windows version?
faq.a4: Yes, a Windows 11 version is in development. If you'd like to be notified when it's available, send us an email at our support address.
faq.q5: How do I back up my data?
faq.a5: Lexcase can perform automatic daily, weekly or monthly backups to the folder you choose. You can also manually export your entire database to JSON from Settings and import it back at any time.
faq.q6: What if I stop using the app?
faq.a6: Your data is always yours. You can export it to JSON at any time. If you delete the app from your Mac, the sandbox container is removed along with the local data — so we recommend exporting before uninstalling.
faq.q7: Is Lexcase only for the Dominican Republic?
faq.a7: Lexcase is optimized for legal practice in the Dominican Republic, but it includes specific support for the United States in immigration (DS-160, DS-260, A-Number, NVC Case) and company formation (LLC, C-Corp, S-Corp).
faq.q8: What payment methods will the paid version accept?
faq.a8: The current version is distributed through the Mac App Store, which handles payments in your local currency. We do not process payment information on our servers.
faq.q9: How does it integrate with the macOS Calendar?
faq.a9: Lexcase offers optional sync with the native macOS Calendar. When enabled, your hearings and deadlines appear as regular system events and you receive alerts like any other event.
faq.q10: Can I work from multiple Macs?
faq.a10: Today Lexcase is a local-first app by design. If you work from multiple Macs you can move your database manually by exporting and importing the JSON file. An optional end-to-end encrypted sync service is under evaluation for the future.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: ICLVS Legal Intelligence LLC ("we") operates the macOS application Lexcase (the "App"). This Privacy Policy explains what information we handle, how we handle it, and your rights.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: These Terms and Conditions (the "Terms") govern the use of the macOS application Lexcase (the "App") provided by ICLVS Legal Intelligence LLC ("we"). By downloading, installing or using the App, you accept these Terms.
